maintenance.title: Platform in BETA
maintenance.message: We are performing system maintenance and improvements. Temporary instabilities may occur. Thank you for your patience.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building your mining empire.

errors.identifier_not_found: Email or username does not exist.

register.title: Create your free account
register.subtitle: Join thousands of miners right now.
register.referral_msg: You are being referred by code: {{code}}
register.terms_msg: By registering, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.registration_limit_reached: Registration limit reached for this connection.

dashboard.subtitle: Your mining operation is active. Track next block rewards in real-time.
dashboard.no_blocks: Waiting for the first network block...
dashboard.efficiency_msg: Your mining efficiency is 100%. Keep your machines active.

shop.title: Expand your Operation
shop.subtitle: Purchase state-of-the-art equipment and increase your HashRate to mine blocks more efficiently.
shop.confirm_purchase: Do you really want to buy this miner?
shop.how_it_works_msg: When purchasing a miner, it is sent automatically to your inventory. You must install it in a free rack in your data center to start generating POL. Each miner consumes space and energy, make sure you have infrastructure available.

inventory.title: Mining Room
inventory.subtitle: Manage your equipment and maximize your HashRate.
inventory.buy_miners_msg: Buy miners in the shop to get started.
inventory.tip_msg: Tip: Click a free slot to install a machine from your inventory. Elite machines occupy 2 slots.
inventory.max_rooms: You have already unlocked all available rooms.
inventory.insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance to unlock this room.

modal.confirm_remove: Do you want to send this machine back to inventory?
modal.choose_machine: Choose a machine to install in this slot:

wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your funds and perform On-chain withdrawals.
wallet.withdraw_subtitle: Send your POL directly to your on-chain wallet.
wallet.processing_time: Processing time: Up to 10 business days.
wallet.tip_deposit: Deposits are processed instantly after 1 confirmation on the Polygon network.

faucet.title: Equipment Faucet
faucet.subtitle: Earn free miners every 60 minutes. Complete the partner step to unlock your prize.
faucet.cooldown_msg: You have already collected your prize recently. Come back when the timer reaches zero to win again.
faucet.partner_msg: Click the banner below to visit our sponsor and unlock your reward.
faucet.how_it_works_msg: To keep the pool free, we ask you to visit our sponsors. Click the banner, keep the site open for a few seconds, and the claim button will activate automatically.

shortlinks.title: Shortlinks
shortlinks.subtitle: Complete shortened links to earn extra mining power.
shortlinks.wait_reset: Come back tomorrow after daily reset.
shortlinks.reset_in: Next link will be available in:
shortlinks.shortlink_msg: Shortlinks are third-party links that generate revenue for the pool, allowing us to distribute free miners. You must pass through some verification pages (captchas) to complete the link. Upon completion, mining power is added instantly to your inventory.

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Send the POL payment on Polygon to the official address. The server verifies on-chain — you can leave and come back later.
checkin.reset_in: Your next bonus will be available in:
checkin.link_wallet_hint: Link and verify your wallet on the Wallet page to use check-in.
checkin.link_wallet_first: Link your wallet on the Wallet page first.
checkin.failed_retry: Last attempt failed. Send a new payment or tap “Complete check-in” after fixing.
checkin.unavailable: Check-in is unavailable on the server.
checkin.come_back: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak.
checkin.subtitle_free: Your streak and history are stored on the server. One check-in per calendar day (America/São Paulo).
checkin.free_hint: No POL payment — one tap per day keeps your streak.
checkin.server_note_free: When you reopen the site, streak and history load from the database.
checkin.server_note: The server validates amount, recipient, and sender on-chain. Pending transactions are rechecked automatically in the background.

ptc.title: Paid to Click
ptc.subtitle: Earn POL by visiting our partners' websites for a few seconds.
ptc.no_ads: No ads available right now. Check back later!
ptc.wait_msg: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to claim your reward.

youtube.title: YouTube Rewards
youtube.subtitle: Watch videos from our community and earn HashRate or POL.
youtube.no_videos: No videos available at the moment.

offers.title: Popular Offers
offers.subtitle: Exclusive event miners. Pay with your in-game balance — items go to your inventory.
offers.empty: No active offers right now. Check back soon.
offers.confirm_note: The amount will be debited from your balance. The miner appears in Inventory for installation.

calculator.title: Earnings Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate your earnings based on hash rate and current network
calculator.manual_my_hash: Manual value — click "My inventory" to sync
calculator.no_miners: No machines available in the shop.
calculator.results_placeholder: Fill in your hash rate and network hash rate to calculate
calculator.notes_estimate: Estimate does not account for network fluctuations
